title: Technical advisory groups
doc_html:
§2202.  Technical advisory groups

A board may create technical advisory groups to provide assistance to the board.

Acts 2008, No. 743, §2, eff. July  1, 2008.
doc_text:
§2202.  Technical advisory groups
A board may create technical advisory groups to provide assistance to the board.
Acts 2008, No. 743, §2, eff. July  1, 2008.
